_comment: Day 1 publish config. Reads $POSTFORME_API_KEY from env. Run from your Mac (not Cowork sandbox) with: python3 pipeline/publish.py series/days/01-publish.json
_caption_note: v2 — adds the meta-flex (written/edited/captioned/published by AI) which is the strongest possible proof for the agentic-pipeline thesis. Hashtags pushed below the 'more' fold via dot-separator lines (IG strips empty lines, dots survive). Body 142 chars; visible preview cuts before the dots.
caption:
Day 1 of training AI to be my video editor. Written, edited, captioned, and published by AI. Follow + comment 'DAY 1' for the guide + plugin.
